advice: Engage in at least 30 minutes of aerobic exercise three to four times a week.
how_to: Choose activities like walking, dancing, or swimming that elevate your heart rate.
episode_title: E195: The Exercise Neuroscientist: NEW RESEARCH, The Shocking Link Between Exercise And Dementia!

advice: Start with just five minutes of exercise if you're feeling depressed.
how_to: Commit to a very short duration to overcome initial resistance, as momentum builds once you begin.
episode_title: E195: The Exercise Neuroscientist: NEW RESEARCH, The Shocking Link Between Exercise And Dementia!

how_to: Set up automatic monthly transfers from your checking account to your investment account before you have a chance to spend the money.
episode_title: E156: The Financial Expert: How To Get So Rich You Never Have To Work Again!

advice: Negotiate your salary aggressively when starting a new job or during performance reviews.
how_to: Research the market rate for your position and experience level using sites like Glassdoor or Salary.com. Practice your negotiation skills and be prepared to walk away if your needs aren't met.
episode_title: E156: The Financial Expert: How To Get So Rich You Never Have To Work Again!

how_to: Open a brokerage account and invest in low-cost index funds that track the S&P 500 or the total stock market. Consider using a robo-advisor to automate the process.
episode_title: E156: The Financial Expert: How To Get So Rich You Never Have To Work Again!

how_to: Write down three things you are grateful for every morning.
episode_title: E203: Mo Gawdat: A WARNING about Stress, Anxiety & Depression! This Is Causing 70% Of Heart Attacks!

advice: Observe your thoughts without identifying with them
how_to: When anxiety arises, acknowledge it but recognize it as a fleeting thought, like a passing cloud.
episode_title: E203: Mo Gawdat: A WARNING about Stress, Anxiety & Depression! This Is Causing 70% Of Heart Attacks!

advice: Focus on controlling what you can
how_to: Identify elements in your life that are causing stress and determine which you can influence and actively adjust them.
episode_title: E203: Mo Gawdat: A WARNING about Stress, Anxiety & Depression! This Is Causing 70% Of Heart Attacks!

advice: Shift from comparing yourself to others to focusing on personal improvement.
how_to: Instead of asking "How can I be the best?" ask "How can I be better than I was yesterday?"
episode_title: E187: Simon Sinek: The Number One Reason Why You're Not Succeeding | E187

advice: Refocus your efforts on building something valuable instead of defeating competition.
how_to: Instead of asking “How do I beat the competition?” ask “How do I build something worth building?”
episode_title: E187: Simon Sinek: The Number One Reason Why You're Not Succeeding | E187

advice: Achieve and maintain a healthy weight to optimize hormone balance and reproductive function.
how_to: Aim for a BMI within the healthy range through balanced diet and regular exercise. Even a 5-10% weight loss can make a difference.
episode_title: E178: The Fertility Doctor: Top 5 Things Harming Your Fertility & How To Fix Them!

advice: Minimize exposure to environmental toxins by making simple swaps in your daily routine.
how_to: Use glass containers instead of plastic, buy organic produce when possible (focusing on the "dirty dozen"), and filter your drinking water.
episode_title: E178: The Fertility Doctor: Top 5 Things Harming Your Fertility & How To Fix Them!

advice: Actively manage stress to support hormonal balance and reproductive health.
how_to: Prioritize sleep, incorporate stress-reducing activities like meditation or yoga into your routine, and consider professional counseling if needed.
episode_title: E178: The Fertility Doctor: Top 5 Things Harming Your Fertility & How To Fix Them!

advice: Seek professional evaluation for fertility issues promptly based on age.
how_to: Consult a fertility specialist after 12 months of trying to conceive if under 35, or after 6 months if 35 or older.
episode_title: E178: The Fertility Doctor: Top 5 Things Harming Your Fertility & How To Fix Them!
